name: Sassy Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream together the butter and sugar; add applesauce. Mix in baking soda, salt, nutmeg, and cinnamon.
3. Dredge raisins in flour, then add both flour and raisins to the batter.
4. Bake in a greased 15 x 10-inch jelly roll pan for 20-25 minutes at 350°F.
5. Cool thoroughly in the pan.
6. Frost with a powdered sugar glaze. Cut into bars.
Yield: 36 pieces.
